examples.user: Run the monthly memo for April 2025.
examples.outcome: Writes wiki/memos/memo_2025_04.md plus a Decision page. Prints a Rich table with transaction count, statement count, finding count.
Iterates 12 months. Skips any period whose memo file already exists. Final summary line shows ok / errored / processed counts.

examples.user: Why did we say merchant X was a subscription back in March?
examples.outcome: Reconstructs the wiki + ontology fingerprints recorded at decision time. Flags drift if the wiki has changed since.

examples.user: Re-publish a memo I edited the inputs for.
examples.outcome: Bypasses the existing-file skip. Emits a fresh Decision page (different ts) so the edit is auditable.
